name: troubleshoot_agent
_comment_tools: Sub-agents need access to set_session_state for the trigger pattern to work.
Without it, when the customer requests escalation while talking to this agent,
the LLM can't set _action_trigger and the callback can't intercept.
end_session is a platform-provided SYSTEM tool -- do not create a directory for it.
_comment_callbacks: This agent only has beforeModelCallbacks -- not beforeAgent or afterModel.
WHY: The trigger-handling before_model_callback must exist on ALL agents
that handle user messages, not just root. Without it, escalation triggers
set by the LLM while the customer is talking to this sub-agent would never
be intercepted. The before_agent and after_model callbacks handle concerns
(auth derivation, farewell injection) that only apply to the root agent.
